extDesc.message: Write quick notes from the toolbar. They stay saved on this device.

noteListHelp.message: In the notes list, press Tab to move between a note's select and delete buttons. Use Up/Down or Left/Right Arrow to move between notes, Home for the first note, and End for the last note.

placeholder.message: Select a note, or create a new one.

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

emptyNoteListDescription.message: The note area below becomes your first note. Start typing to save it on this device automatically.

onboardingGuide.message: Even one line is enough. Type it here and it stays saved on this device.

firstNotePlaceholder.message: Example: something to check later, a quick idea, or a shopping item

emptySearchResultsDescription.message: Try a shorter search term or different words.

premiumLimit.message: You can create up to $COUNT$ notes on the free plan. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited notes.
